_meta.purpose: Prioritized task backlog — updated after each cycle. Tasks are ordered by impact/risk, not by size.

active_tasks.title: Add CLAUDE.md root enforcement file
active_tasks.why: Enforces audit-first, plan-before-code, QA-after-build behavior for every session. Zero risk. Maximum leverage.
active_tasks.business_impact: Every future session starts from correct context and follows the agent loop
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Development quality depends on human memory; agentic improvements stay theoretical

active_tasks.title: Rewrite orchestrator + specialist agent prompts
active_tasks.progress_note: agentic/roles.md created with full role specs. connsura-ai-system/prompts/ all 6 files rewritten (orchestrator, backend, frontend, qa, security, ops).
active_tasks.why: Current prompts are 3-7 line stubs with no execution logic, scope, or decision boundaries
active_tasks.business_impact: Enables role-based task routing; prevents scope creep; enforces QA and security review
active_tasks.technical_impact: No code changes — rewrites connsura-ai-system/prompts/ files
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: No agent specialization = one undifferentiated context handling everything badly

active_tasks.title: Add Winston structured logging to backend
active_tasks.progress_note: Winston installed and centralized logger added at backend/utils/logger.js. Replaced backend console.* calls with logger methods and validated backend startup logging.
active_tasks.why: console.error() is not queryable, not filterable, not alertable. Production errors are invisible.
active_tasks.business_impact: Can diagnose production issues without SSH; enables alerting
active_tasks.technical_impact: Replace all console.error/console.log in controllers with logger.error/logger.info
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Cannot diagnose production incidents; agentic monitoring impossible

active_tasks.title: Add Sentry error tracking
active_tasks.why: Runtime exceptions in production are currently invisible unless reported by users
active_tasks.business_impact: Proactive error detection before organizers/buyers report issues
active_tasks.technical_impact: Add @sentry/node; configure DSN via env; add Express error handler middleware
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Silent failures on event day; organizers lose trust
active_tasks.progress_note: Added guarded Sentry integration in backend with DSN-based enablement, Express error capture, request context tags, and payload scrubbing.

active_tasks.title: Add Zod schema validation on all public endpoints
active_tasks.why: ticketSelections and other public inputs have no schema validation — only manual sanitize.js
active_tasks.business_impact: Prevents malformed data from corrupting event records; reduces server errors
active_tasks.technical_impact: Create backend/schemas/ + backend/middleware/validate.js; wire into publicController routes
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Data integrity issues; exploitable by malformed payloads
active_tasks.progress_note: Phase 1 + Phase 2 complete. Centralized Zod validation now wired across public/non-admin routes, including remaining organizer access-code and mutation endpoints.

active_tasks.title: Add GitHub Actions CI pipeline
active_tasks.why: Zero automation currently. Nothing runs on push. Regressions ship undetected.
active_tasks.business_impact: Catches breaking changes before they reach production
active_tasks.technical_impact: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml with: npm ci, eslint, npm audit, run tests
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Every agentic improvement has no safety net
active_tasks.progress_note: CI evolved from baseline to behavioral gates: backend job now provisions Postgres and runs required integration tests (npm run test:scan, npm run test:request-approval, npm run test:cancellation, npm run test:organizer-recovery) serially, plus syntax/audit checks.

active_tasks.title: Integration tests: scan flow
active_tasks.why: The scan endpoint is the most critical path at runtime (event day). Currently untested.
active_tasks.business_impact: Prevents scan regressions from causing event-day failures
active_tasks.technical_impact: POST /api/scans with valid/invalid/used/cross-event tickets; needs test DB
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: A silent regression on scan logic could ruin a live event
active_tasks.progress_note: Added first backend integration suite for scan flow using node:test + supertest + Prisma-backed DB schema isolation. Covered VALID, ALREADY_USED, INVALID_TICKET, WRONG_EVENT, and BLOCKED outcomes.

active_tasks.title: Integration tests: ticket request + approval flow
active_tasks.why: Approval flow generates tickets on-demand; a bug here means buyers never receive tickets
active_tasks.technical_impact: POST ticket-request → approve → verify tickets created → verify client dashboard
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Approval regressions ship silently; buyers report missing tickets
active_tasks.progress_note: Added backend integration suite for public ticket request + organizer approval/rejection transitions using node:test + supertest + Prisma schema isolation. Follow-up completed: added organizer ticket cancellation backend integration suite as third behavioral gate candidate, organizer recovery OTP/code integration suite as fourth behavioral gate candidate, and deadlock-safe DB reset retry in shared test cleanup to stabilize request-approval runs.

active_tasks.title: Redis-backed rate limiting
active_tasks.why: Current in-memory failed-scan guard resets on restart; abuse protection is illusory
active_tasks.business_impact: Real scan fraud protection that survives crashes and deploys
active_tasks.technical_impact: Add Redis container to docker-compose; swap ioredis store into express-rate-limit
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Scan abuse protection is effectively off after any restart

active_tasks.title: Automated deploy workflow with health check gate
active_tasks.why: Every deploy is manual SSH + docker compose. No validation that deploy succeeded.
active_tasks.business_impact: Faster, safer deployments; auto-rollback on health check failure
active_tasks.technical_impact: GitHub Actions deploy job: SSH → git pull → docker compose up → GET /health → alert on fail
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Failed deploys go undetected; organizers hit broken production

active_tasks.title: AI approval assist — flag suspicious ticket requests
active_tasks.why: Organizers manually review every request. AI can flag velocity anomalies, duplicate emails, and payment evidence issues.
active_tasks.business_impact: Saves organizer time; reduces fraud; differentiates the product
active_tasks.technical_impact: Phase MVP implemented with deterministic backend risk signals on organizer request review responses and dashboard rendering; no LLM/model inference yet.
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Product remains a basic CRUD app; no AI differentiation
active_tasks.progress_note: Phase 1-4 delivered for triage MVP: deterministic risk signals + risk-priority sorting + risk/status filters are live, and requests now include deterministic explainable organizer recommendations (APPROVE/REVIEW/REJECT) rendered in Dashboard and DashboardTicketRequests. Manual approval/rejection flow remains unchanged.

active_tasks.title: Organizer analytics dashboard
active_tasks.why: No organizer can currently see their request conversion rate, peak request times, or promoter performance
active_tasks.business_impact: Platform stickiness; data organizers can't get elsewhere
active_tasks.technical_impact: Aggregation layer on existing data + frontend dashboard section
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Organizers have no reason to prefer this platform over alternatives

active_tasks.title: Automatic organizer invoicing before event start
active_tasks.why: Organizer billing before event start was manual and error-prone. The platform needed deterministic invoicing based on approved-ticket snapshots.
active_tasks.business_impact: Organizers now receive timed invoices with clear due windows and currency-specific payment instructions, reducing billing delays and disputes.
active_tasks.technical_impact: Added invoice persistence model, scheduler-driven generation at T-24h, email/chat delivery, admin-managed per-currency payment instructions, and admin event-level invoice visibility.
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Billing remains ad-hoc and untracked; payment instructions can be inconsistent across organizers/events.
active_tasks.progress_note: MVP implemented with snapshot billing (approved tickets at generation time), one-invoice-per-event enforcement, missing-instruction blocking status, and integration test coverage for ETB/USD/EUR + snapshot immutability + duplicate prevention.

active_tasks.title: Invoice payment state management MVP
active_tasks.why: Invoices needed minimal operational lifecycle handling after send to support real admin workflows before payment gateway integration.
active_tasks.business_impact: Admin can mark invoices paid and overdue invoices are auto-flagged, making invoice operations actionable and auditable.
active_tasks.technical_impact: Added PAID/OVERDUE states, paidAt/paymentNote fields, scheduler overdue transition, admin mark-paid API action, admin event detail UI controls, and integration tests for paid/overdue transitions.
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Sent invoices remain operationally ambiguous and overdue debt cannot be tracked without manual external bookkeeping.
active_tasks.progress_note: State transitions now support SENT->PAID, OVERDUE->PAID, and automatic SENT/PARTIAL_SEND_FAILED->OVERDUE past dueAt. PAID invoices remain PAID.

active_tasks.title: Admin invoice dashboard MVP
active_tasks.why: Invoice operations required a centralized admin overview instead of per-event-only visibility.
active_tasks.business_impact: Admin can quickly triage overdue/unpaid/blocked invoices and jump into event-level actions.
active_tasks.technical_impact: Added GET /api/admin/invoices endpoint, AdminInvoicesPage route, admin nav link, and lightweight status filters (ALL/OVERDUE/UNPAID/BLOCKED).
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Invoice follow-up remains slow and error-prone because visibility is fragmented across event detail pages.
active_tasks.progress_note: Dashboard lists event, organizer email, amount, status, dueAt, paidAt with responsive table/cards and minimal filter controls.

active_tasks.title: Settlement-based organizer billing model MVP
active_tasks.why: Single snapshot invoices were insufficient for real-world settlement after event completion and incremental sales.
active_tasks.business_impact: Billing now supports pre-event invoicing, post-event final settlement, payment tracking, remaining-balance math, and overdue enforcement on organizer event creation.
active_tasks.technical_impact: Added settlement fields (totalAmount, amountPaid, previousInvoiceId), POST_EVENT_FINAL flow, balance-based final invoice logic, overdue final enforcement block, and warning messaging before event start.
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Early/partial/unpaid cases produce incorrect billing and weak collections enforcement.
active_tasks.progress_note: Implemented settlement equation total charges - total payments, added final invoice generation at event end + 30m, added block for unpaid overdue final balance, and validated all six required settlement scenarios in integration tests.

active_tasks.title: Invoice partial payment recording MVP
active_tasks.why: Admin operations needed incremental payment recording so invoices can be settled across multiple manual payments.
active_tasks.business_impact: Invoice balances now update correctly across partial/multiple payments, reducing manual math errors and improving settlement accuracy.
active_tasks.technical_impact: Added PATCH /api/admin/invoices/:invoiceId/add-payment with safe amount increment/clamp, status recalculation, and minimal AdminEventDetail invoice payment input action.
active_tasks.risk_if_ignored: Only all-or-nothing payment marking causes inaccurate balances during real partial-payment workflows.
active_tasks.progress_note: Added deterministic add-payment flow (amountPaid += paymentAmount, remaining recompute, PAID when remaining <= 0), overpayment clamping, and integration tests for partial accumulation.

completed_tasks.title: Fix chat attachment data loss (Docker volume path)
Add rate limiting to recovery/contact OTP endpoints
Resolve npm CVEs in backend and frontend
Add Winston structured logging to backend
Add Zod schema validation on all public endpoints
Integration tests: ticket request + approval flow
Automatic organizer invoicing before event start
